content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：奧吉爾EP·無愧榮光，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：奧吉爾EP·無愧榮光
那個身量尚且不如長槍的年輕騎士，無愧於對公主宣誓時許下的每一句誓言。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Ogier EP· Worthy of the Glory》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Ogier EP· Worthy of the Glory》 
The young knight, whose stature was not even as tall as the lance, lived up to every word of the oath he made to the princess.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：奧吉爾EP·無愧榮光
